Author: mole99

It is part of the "Chip" flow in LibreLane: https://github.com/librelane/librelane/blob/b113e3046d386f7ebbd8ccde014a7e43db91b92a/librelane/flows/chip.py#L103

I have just checked whether the final GDS of the default template includes the sealring and it does. You can download the GDS from the CI at the bottom of this page: https://github.com/wafer-space/gf180mcu-project-template/actions/runs/20265648569

Is your design digital or analog?

Since the project template generates the GDS with the sealring, you could move your changes over to a fresh repository.

Author: trev5514

Author: mole99
Content: Great! Normally, the final GDS should be inside the folder `librelane/runs/<timestamp>/final/gds/`. If there is no file in this folder, it means that an error occurred during the process. Did you get any errors at the end of the flow?
